description: Keyword-to-symbol search index derived from the WIPO IPC catchword index (IPC 2026.01). Maps 21,361 natural-language keywords to their corresponding IPC classification symbols. Use this for keyword-based discovery of relevant IPC codes (e.g., search for 'laser' to find H01S, B23K26/00, etc.).

columns.name: catchword
columns.description: Natural-language keyword phrase from the WIPO catchword index (e.g., 'tanning LEATHER', 'FOOD processors'). The capitalized word is the primary index term.

columns.name: symbol
columns.description: IPC symbol in canonical 14-character zero-padded format (e.g., 'A21C0013000000'). JOIN key to tls_ipc_hierarchy.symbol.

columns.name: symbol_short
columns.description: Human-readable short form of the IPC symbol (e.g., 'A21C13/00').

columns.name: symbol_patstat
columns.description: IPC symbol in PATSTAT spacing format (e.g., 'A21C  13/00'). JOIN key to tls209_appln_ipc.ipc_class_symbol. NULL for section/class/subclass-level entries.

columns.name: parent_catchword
columns.description: Primary index term under which this catchword is grouped (e.g., 'LEATHER' for 'tanning LEATHER'). Useful for finding related catchwords.
